name: Pleat
description: Folded cloth in warm linen tones — each pleat re-creases at its own slant, shading one half of every fold.

code.style: --cloth: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--cloth); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 50%; background: rgba(35, 30, 24, 0.22); transform: skewX(@rand(-14deg, 14deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
